name: awesome-ai4biology
description: A curated list of AI tools, models, and resources for biology and life sciences

tools.name: AlphaFold (v2/v3)
tools.description: A revolutionary AI system by Google DeepMind that predicts a protein's 3D structure from its amino acid sequence with near-experimental accuracy.

tools.name: RoseTTAFold / RoseTTAFold-All-Atom
tools.description: A deep learning tool that rapidly and accurately predicts protein structures and their interactions with other molecules (DNA, RNA, small molecules).

tools.name: ESMFold
tools.description: A fast protein structure prediction model from Meta AI that uses large-scale protein language models (ESM-2) to predict structures directly from sequences without MSAs.

tools.name: RFdiffusion
tools.description: A generative diffusion model for de novo protein design, capable of creating novel protein backbones for a wide range of functional challenges.

tools.name: ProteinMPNN
tools.description: A robust deep learning tool for protein sequence design (inverse folding) that generates sequences folding into a given target backbone structure.

tools.name: Chroma
tools.description: A programmable generative model for protein structures and complexes, enabling design of proteins with specific geometric and functional properties.

tools.name: FrameFlow
tools.description: A generative model for protein structure design using SE(3) flow matching on frames, improving the efficiency and quality of de novo protein generation.

tools.name: OmegaFold
tools.description: A high-resolution protein structure prediction tool that does not require MSAs, relying solely on a single primary sequence.

tools.name: ESM (Evolutionary Scale Modeling)
tools.description: A suite of transformer-based models (ESM-1b, ESM-2) trained on hundreds of millions of protein sequences to capture evolutionary and structural information.

tools.name: ProtTrans
tools.description: A collection of massive protein language models (ProtBERT, ProtT5) trained using various architectures to provide state-of-the-art protein representations.

tools.name: ProGen / ProGen2
tools.description: LLMs for protein generation that can be controlled by specifying protein properties or families, enabling the design of functional artificial proteins.

tools.name: ProtGPT2
tools.description: An autoregressive transformer model trained on the entire protein sequence space, capable of generating de novo protein sequences following natural principles.

tools.name: Ankh
tools.description: An optimized protein language model focusing on general-purpose protein modeling with high efficiency.

tools.name: xTrimoPGLM
tools.description: A unified 100B-scale pre-trained transformer designed to decipher the language of proteins, supporting both representation and generation tasks.

tools.name: DeepFRI
tools.description: A Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) method for predicting protein functions (GO terms) by integrating sequence and structural information.

tools.name: DeepGOPlus
tools.description: Combines deep CNNs with sequence similarity-based predictions to provide accurate Gene Ontology (GO) annotations.

tools.name: NetGO
tools.description: A web server for high-accuracy protein function prediction that integrates multiple network-based and sequence-based features.

tools.name: ProteinBERT
tools.description: A universal deep-learning model for protein sequence and function prediction using a unique architecture to handle very long sequences.

tools.name: CleanProtein
tools.description: A framework for protein function prediction that focuses on cleaning and denoising protein data to improve AI-driven annotations.

tools.name: AlphaFold-Multimer
tools.description: An extension of AlphaFold v2 specifically trained to predict the 3D structures of multi-chain protein complexes.

tools.name: RoseTTAFold2-PPI
tools.description: A fast and accurate deep learning method for large-scale protein-protein interaction screening and complex structure prediction.

tools.name: MaSIF
tools.description: A geometric deep learning framework to learn representations of protein surfaces, used for predicting PPI sites and docking.

tools.name: PIPR
tools.description: A deep learning framework using a Siamese residual RCNN architecture to predict PPIs from protein sequences alone.

tools.name: D-PPI
tools.description: A deep learning model for predicting protein-protein interactions by leveraging evolutionary information and deep neural networks.

tools.name: IgFold
tools.description: A fast and accurate antibody structure prediction tool using a pre-trained language model to predict structures from sequences in seconds.

tools.name: DiffAb
tools.description: A diffusion-based generative model for antigen-specific antibody design, generating both sequences and structures of CDRs.

tools.name: AntiFold
tools.description: A tool for antibody structure-based sequence design, predicting sequences that fit into given antibody variable domain structures.

tools.name: AbDesign
tools.description: A computational framework for the de novo design of antibody variable domains, integrating Rosetta-based energy functions and AI.

tools.name: DeepAb
tools.description: A deep learning method for predicting antibody Fv structures, utilizing a recurrent neural network with attention mechanisms.

tools.name: DeePMD-kit
tools.description: A deep learning package for many-body potential energy representation and molecular dynamics, achieving ab initio accuracy with empirical potential efficiency.

tools.name: SchNet / SchNetPack
tools.description: A continuous-filter convolutional neural network designed to model quantum-mechanical properties of molecules and materials.

tools.name: TorchMD
tools.description: A framework for molecular simulations using PyTorch, enabling the integration of machine learning potentials and differentiable simulations.

tools.name: NeuralMD
tools.description: A tool for performing molecular dynamics simulations with neural network potentials, focusing on high-performance and scalability.

tools.name: GNN-MD
tools.description: Using Graph Neural Networks to accelerate molecular dynamics simulations by predicting forces and energies directly from molecular graphs.

tools.name: MACE
tools.description: A fast and accurate machine learning force field based on the Atomic Cluster Expansion (ACE) and equivariant message passing.

tools.name: DeepVariant
tools.description: Uses deep CNNs to call genetic variants from NGS data, greatly improving variant detection accuracy.

tools.name: SpliceAI
tools.description: A deep learning tool by Illumina that predicts splice sites from DNA sequences, identifying cryptic splicing variants causing diseases.

tools.name: Enformer
tools.description: A Transformer-based architecture that predicts gene expression and chromatin states using long-range genomic interactions up to 100kb.

tools.name: CADD
tools.description: Combined Annotation Dependent Depletion — uses machine learning to integrate multiple annotations for scoring the deleteriousness of human genetic variants.

tools.name: Sei
tools.description: A deep learning framework predicting the effects of sequence alterations on 21,907 genomic features and classifying them into regulatory sequence categories.

tools.name: Clair3
tools.description: A variant calling tool optimized for long-read sequencing (e.g., Oxford Nanopore), combining neural networks and ensemble learning.

tools.name: AlphaGenome
tools.description: A unified DNA sequence model (2025) that predicts thousands of functional genomic features from 1Mb input sequences.

tools.name: popEVE
tools.description: An AI model (2025) for predicting the disease-causing potential of rare variants in patient genomes.

tools.name: scGPT
tools.description: A Transformer-based single-cell foundation model pre-trained on millions of cells, applicable to cell type annotation, batch correction, and gene network inference.

tools.name: Geneformer
tools.description: A context-aware attention model pre-trained on large-scale single-cell transcriptomic data, excelling at predicting gene network perturbation effects.

tools.name: scVI
tools.description: A VAE-based probabilistic framework for single-cell RNA-seq dimensionality reduction, clustering, and differential expression analysis.

tools.name: CellTypist
tools.description: An automated cell type annotation tool based on logistic regression and massive reference datasets, suitable for cross-tissue and cross-species single-cell data.

tools.name: scBERT
tools.description: Uses BERT architecture for single-cell cell type prediction, capturing gene-gene interactions through pre-training.

tools.name: scFoundation
tools.description: A 100M-parameter large-scale single-cell foundation model supporting cell embedding, gene expression prediction, and drug response prediction.

tools.name: scPRINT
tools.description: A model (2025) pre-trained on over 50 million cells, capable of robust gene network inference.

tools.name: DeepSEA
tools.description: A deep learning sequence model that directly predicts chromatin features (TF binding, histone modifications) from DNA sequences.

tools.name: ChromHMM
tools.description: An HMM-based tool for automatically learning and characterizing chromatin states from multiple histone modification datasets.

tools.name: DeepCpG
tools.description: Uses deep neural networks to predict single-cell DNA methylation states, integrating local sequence and neighboring methylation information.

tools.name: Basenji
tools.description: A deep CNN for predicting genome-wide DNA regulatory activity (DNase-seq, ChIP-seq signals).

tools.name: EpiMap
tools.description: Integrates thousands of epigenomic maps and uses deep learning to predict enhancer activity across tissues and cell types.

tools.name: DeepChrome
tools.description: Uses CNN to predict gene expression levels from histone modification features in promoter regions.

tools.name: SPOT-RNA
tools.description: Uses ensemble deep learning and transfer learning to predict RNA secondary structures, significantly improving non-canonical base pair prediction.

tools.name: EternaFold
tools.description: An RNA secondary structure prediction model trained through multi-task learning and crowdsourced data (Eterna game) with strong generalization.

tools.name: RNAfold
tools.description: A classic RNA secondary structure prediction tool (part of ViennaRNA), based on thermodynamic models and commonly used as a benchmark for AI models.

tools.name: E2Efold
tools.description: An end-to-end deep learning model that directly predicts RNA secondary structures from sequences without relying on traditional thermodynamic parameters.

tools.name: MXfold2
tools.description: Combines deep learning with thermodynamic constraints for RNA secondary structure prediction through a differentiable learning framework.

tools.name: BigRNA
tools.description: A foundation model by Deep Genomics that predicts multiple RNA regulatory processes including splicing, translation, and degradation.

tools.name: DeepCRISPR
tools.description: A unified deep learning framework for predicting CRISPR/Cas9 off-target effects and on-target efficiency.

tools.name: CRISPR-Net
tools.description: Uses RNN and CNN to predict CRISPR/Cas9 off-target activity, performing well on imbalanced datasets.

tools.name: DeepHF
tools.description: A deep learning model optimized for high-fidelity Cas9 variants, predicting sgRNA on-target efficiency.

tools.name: Pythia
tools.description: An AI tool (2025) that predicts how cells repair their DNA after CRISPR cutting, enabling precise editing.

tools.name: CCTop
tools.description: A classic CRISPR/Cas on-target and off-target prediction tool, now integrating multiple AI algorithms for improved accuracy.

tools.name: BE-Hive
tools.description: A machine learning model specifically designed for base editing, predicting editing product distributions and efficiency.

tools.name: MOFA+
tools.description: Multi-Omics Factor Analysis — an unsupervised framework for integrating different omics data from the same set of samples.

tools.name: MultiVI
tools.description: Part of the scvi-tools framework, for joint analysis of single-cell RNA-seq and ATAC-seq data, supporting both paired and unpaired data.

tools.name: MultiVelo
tools.description: Combines single-cell transcriptomics and chromatin accessibility data to infer gene regulatory dynamics.

tools.name: Flexynesis
tools.description: A deep learning toolkit (2025) for bulk multi-omics data integration, advancing precision oncology research.

tools.name: scJoint
tools.description: Uses transfer learning and neural networks to integrate heterogeneous single-cell multi-omics data, transferring labels across modalities.

tools.name: MOGONET
tools.description: A GCN-based multi-omics integration method for classification and biomarker discovery, capturing complex inter-omics relationships.

tools.name: MolBERT
tools.description: A BERT-based molecular representation learning model pre-trained on large-scale chemical libraries for property prediction and drug screening.

tools.name: MegaMolBART
tools.description: A large-scale generative model by NVIDIA using Transformer architecture on SMILES strings for molecular generation, optimization, and property prediction.

tools.name: DrugGPT
tools.description: A GPT-based strategy for designing potential ligands targeting specific proteins by learning protein-ligand interactions.

tools.name: DiffDock
tools.description: A diffusion model-based molecular docking tool that predicts 3D binding structures of small molecule ligands with protein receptors.

tools.name: TankBind
tools.description: A deep learning model for protein-ligand binding affinity prediction and binding site identification, handling multiple potential binding pockets.

tools.name: REINVENT
tools.description: A reinforcement learning framework for de novo drug design, automatically optimizing molecules with specific bioactivity through generative models and scoring functions.

tools.name: MolGPT
tools.description: A GPT-based molecular generation model that learns the probability distribution of SMILES strings to generate chemically valid novel molecules.

tools.name: PubMedBERT
tools.description: A domain-specific language model by Microsoft, fully pre-trained on PubMed full-text and abstracts, achieving SOTA on multiple biomedical NLP tasks.

tools.name: BioGPT
tools.description: A generative pre-trained Transformer by Microsoft for biomedical text generation and mining, supporting QA and summarization tasks.

tools.name: GatorTron
tools.description: A large-scale clinical language model by UF and NVIDIA, trained on massive EHR data to enhance clinical decision support.

tools.name: Med-PaLM / Med-PaLM 2
tools.description: Google's medical-specific large model achieving near-expert-level performance on medical exams and clinical QA through instruction fine-tuning.

tools.name: BioBERT
tools.description: The first BERT model fine-tuned on large-scale biomedical corpora, widely used for NER and relation extraction.

tools.name: BioMedLM (PubMedGPT)
tools.description: A 2.7B parameter model by Stanford CRFM and MosaicML, optimized for biomedical literature with balanced performance and inference efficiency.

tools.name: CellPose
tools.description: A generalist deep learning-based cell segmentation algorithm that handles various microscopy images with strong generalization.

tools.name: StarDist
tools.description: A deep learning tool for segmenting cell nuclei and other star-convex objects by predicting radial distances.

tools.name: DeepCell
tools.description: A software library for large-scale biological image analysis, providing deep learning models for cell segmentation, tracking, and lineage analysis.

tools.name: Segment Anything for Microscopy
tools.description: Adapts Meta's SAM model to microscopy images, supporting prompt-based (points, boxes) rapid segmentation of complex biological structures.

tools.name: nnU-Net
tools.description: A self-configuring biomedical image segmentation framework that automatically adapts network architecture and training parameters based on dataset characteristics.

tools.name: Ilastik
tools.description: An interactive image classification and segmentation tool combining classical ML and deep learning workflows, suitable for biologists without programming backgrounds.

tools.name: ProteinMPNN
tools.description: A powerful protein sequence design tool (inverse folding) that predicts optimal amino acid sequences for given backbone structures.

tools.name: RFdiffusion
tools.description: A diffusion model-based protein backbone design tool for de novo design of novel protein structures with specific functions or binding properties.

tools.name: ART
tools.description: Automated Recommendation Tool — uses ML and probabilistic modeling to guide synthetic biology experiment design, optimizing metabolic pathways and gene expression.

tools.name: ESM-2 / ESMFold
tools.description: Meta's protein language model that predicts protein structure and function from sequence alone, greatly accelerating component design in synthetic biology.

tools.name: PromoterCAD
tools.description: An AI tool for synthetic promoter design, using deep learning to predict and optimize gene expression regulatory sequences.

tools.name: Asari
tools.description: A high-performance LC-MS metabolomics data processing tool providing more accurate peak detection and annotation.

tools.name: DeepMetabolism
tools.description: Combines deep learning with metabolic network constraints for predicting cellular phenotypes and metabolic fluxes.

tools.name: MetaboAnalyst
tools.description: A widely-used metabolomics analysis platform with integrated ML modules for biomarker discovery and pathway analysis.

tools.name: PCPFM
tools.description: A cloud-native metabolomics processing framework supporting automated processing and quality control for large-scale datasets.

tools.name: COBRApy
tools.description: A core Python library for constraint-based metabolic network modeling in systems biology, supporting FBA and other analysis algorithms.

tools.name: Fusang
tools.description: A deep learning-based phylogenetic tree inference framework achieving performance comparable to maximum likelihood methods with higher computational efficiency.

tools.name: MyESL
tools.description: A software tool for evolutionary sparse learning in molecular phylogenetics and genomics.

tools.name: Phyloformer
tools.description: Uses Transformer architecture for phylogenetic tree prediction by learning evolutionary relationships between sequences.

tools.name: DeepEvolve
tools.description: A deep learning framework for simulating and inferring evolutionary dynamics, identifying natural selection signals and population history.

tools.name: PyPop7
tools.description: A pure-Python library of population-based randomized optimization algorithms, commonly used in evolutionary computation and complex biological parameter optimization.

tools.name: Edge AI for Conservation
tools.description: Leverages edge computing and AI for wildlife monitoring and ecosystem science, supporting real-time analysis on field devices.

tools.name: Awesome Neuro-AI
tools.description: A curated resource list at the intersection of deep learning and neuroscience, covering brain modeling, neural decoding, and more.

tools.name: AI in Agriculture
tools.description: A survey and toolset of deep learning techniques for crops, fisheries, and livestock, aiming to improve agricultural productivity and sustainability.

tools.name: AI-Assisted Bio-Curation
tools.description: Uses AI to extract, structure, and standardize morphological trait data from published literature, advancing biodiversity research.

tools.name: Awesome Green AI
tools.description: Focuses on AI applications in environmental impact assessment and carbon footprint reduction, particularly modeling biological system responses to climate change.

tools.name: Robin
tools.description: FutureHouse's end-to-end scientific discovery agent — first AI-generated drug discovery identifying ripasudil as novel dry AMD therapeutic (2025).

tools.name: Aviary
tools.description: Language agent gymnasium for DNA manipulation, literature search, and protein engineering tasks.

tools.name: Curie
tools.description: Automated and rigorous experiment agent for scientific discovery.

tools.name: ChemCrow
tools.description: LLM agent augmented with chemistry tools for autonomous research (NeurIPS 2023).

tools.name: POPPER
tools.description: Automated hypothesis testing with agentic sequential falsifications.

tools.name: autoresearch
tools.description: Andrej Karpathy's autonomous LLM research framework — overnight experiments with auto code editing.

tools.name: GeneClaw
tools.description: Enterprise AI agent for genome annotation and biopharmaceutical R&D.

tools.name: OpenClaw / Hermes
tools.description: Open-source AI agent framework with Skills ecosystem; WeChat/Feishu integrations.

tools.name: ProteinGym
tools.description: Large-scale benchmarks for protein design and fitness prediction.

tools.name: TAPE
tools.description: Tasks Assessing Protein Embeddings — evaluating protein transfer learning across five tasks.

tools.name: BioProBench
tools.description: Evaluation of LLMs on biological protocols and procedural understanding.

tools.name: MedAgentGym
tools.description: Scalable agentic training environment for code-centric medical reasoning.

tools.name: Tahoe-100M
tools.description: Giga-scale single-cell perturbation atlas for context-dependent gene function (2025).

tools.name: Tahoe-x1
tools.description: Scaling perturbation-trained single-cell foundation models to 3B parameters.

tools.name: OpenBioMed
tools.description: Benchmark for multi-modal biomedical AI (molecule + text + protein).

tools.name: BioSimulations
tools.description: Repository and API for computational models of biological systems.

tools.name: OpenClaw Medical Skills
tools.description: 200+ production-ready SKILL.md files across biology, pharmacology, medicine, omics, and literature search. Largest open-source bio AI skill library.

tools.name: K-Dense
tools.description: 136 ready-to-use skills covering cancer genomics, drug-target binding, molecular dynamics, RNA velocity, 78+ scientific databases.

tools.name: LabClaw
tools.description: 211 production-ready SKILL.md files across 7 domains (biology, pharmacology, medicine). Stanford LabOS-compatible.

tools.name: Dynamic Skills (OpenSpace)
tools.description: MCP-based self-evolving Skills plugin for OpenClaw — agents write and store new Skills as they encounter new tasks.

tools.name: MCP Servers
tools.description: Model Context Protocol servers for biological data — UniProt, PDB, Ensembl, KEGG, and more.

tools.name: Evo / Evo 2
tools.description: Arc Institute's 40B-parameter genome foundation model trained on 9T nucleotides from all domains of life; 1M bp context (Nature 2026).

tools.name: DNABERT-2
tools.description: Efficient foundation model and benchmark for multi-species genome understanding.

tools.name: LucaOne
tools.description: Generalized biological foundation model with unified nucleic acid and protein language (Nature MI 2025).

tools.name: GET (Genome Foundation Model)
tools.description: Foundation model of transcription across human cell types.

tools.name: ESM-3
tools.description: Generalist protein language model for sequence, structure, and function from EvolutionaryScale (2024).

tools.name: Boltz-1
tools.description: First fully open-source model achieving AlphaFold3-level accuracy for biomolecular interaction modeling (bioRxiv 2024).

tools.name: Chai-1
tools.description: Biomolecular structure prediction model from Chai Discovery.

tools.name: Protenix
tools.description: Open reproduction of AlphaFold3 from Bytedance for biomolecular structure prediction.

tools.name: Cell2Sentence
tools.description: Teaching LLMs the language of biology through single-cell transcriptomics (ICML 2024).

tools.name: scMulan
tools.description: Multitask generative pre-trained language model for single-cell analysis.

tools.name: GeneCompass
tools.description: Knowledge-informed cross-species foundation model for gene regulatory mechanisms.

tools.name: RNA-FM
tools.description: RNA foundation model for structure and function prediction.

tools.name: Nucleotide Transformer
tools.description: InstaDeep/EMBL-EBI genome foundation model for DNA sequences.

tools.name: BioT5 / BioT5+
tools.description: Cross-modal integration of biology and chemistry knowledge.

tools.name: NatureLM
tools.description: Deciphering the language of nature for scientific discovery.

tools.name: ChatSpatial
tools.description: MCP server enabling spatial transcriptomics analysis via natural language; integrates 60+ methods (SpaGCN, Cell2location, LIANA+, CellRank) for Visium/Xenium/MERFISH.

tools.name: SUICA
tools.description: Super-high dimensional sparse implicit neural representations for spatial transcriptomics (2025).

tools.name: stDiff
tools.description: Diffusion model for imputing spatial transcriptomics via single-cell data.

tools.name: SpaGCN
tools.description: Graph convolutional network for spatial gene expression and tissue structure.

tools.name: Cell2location
tools.description: Bayesian model for cell type mapping in spatial transcriptomics.

tools.name: LIANA+
tools.description: Cell-cell communication inference from spatial and single-cell data.

tools.name: VCWorld
tools.description: Biological world model for virtual cell simulation (bioRxiv 2025).

tools.name: scDiffusion
tools.description: Conditional generation of high-quality single-cell data using diffusion models.

tools.name: CellPLM
tools.description: Pre-training of cell language model beyond single cells.

tools.name: scDiffEq
tools.description: Drift-diffusion modeling of single-cell dynamics with neural stochastic differential equations.

tools.name: Cellpose 4
tools.description: Cell segmentation and morphometry for microscopy images.

tools.name: scDART
tools.description: Integrating unmatched scRNA-seq and scATAC-seq data via deep learning.

tools.name: SIMBA
tools.description: Single-cell embedding along with features for multi-modal epigenomics.

tools.name: Kraken2 / MetaPhlAn
tools.description: Taxonomic classification and profiling of metagenomic sequences.

tools.name: HUMAnN3
tools.description: Functional profiling of metagenomic and metatranscriptomic sequences.

tools.name: Qiime2
tools.description: Microbiome bioinformatics with a plugin architecture.

tools.name: MetaStorm
tools.description: Metagenomic sequence analysis and visualization.

tools.name: EviCor
tools.description: Ecological co-occurrence analysis and correlation networks.

tools.name: AUGUSTUS / Braker
tools.description: Ab initio gene prediction; evidence-based genome annotation.

tools.name: Prokka
tools.description: Rapid prokaryotic genome annotation.

tools.name: BUSCO
tools.description: Benchmarking universal single-copy orthologs for genome quality assessment.

tools.name: OrthoFinder
tools.description: Phylogenomics and gene family evolution analysis.

tools.name: MAKER
tools.description: Portable and scalable genome annotation pipeline.

tools.name: Funannotate
tools.description: Eukaryotic genome annotation pipeline.

tools.name: MedAgents
tools.description: Multi-disciplinary collaboration framework for zero-shot medical reasoning (ACL 2024).

tools.name: H-optimus-0
tools.description: Powerful feature extraction from histology images for downstream pathology tasks.

tools.name: ClinAgents
tools.description: Clinical multi-agent system for medical decision support.

tools.name: MedEmbed
tools.description: Medical embedding model for EHR data integration.

tools.name: UniProt
tools.description: Protein sequences and function — Direct REST API access for protein search, FASTA retrieval, ID mapping.

tools.name: RCSB PDB
tools.description: 3D protein structures — Search, download coordinates, retrieve metadata for drug discovery.

tools.name: AlphaFold DB
tools.description: AI-predicted protein structures (200M+ proteins).

tools.name: STRING
tools.description: Protein-protein interactions — 59M proteins, 20B interactions, 5000+ species.

tools.name: KEGG / Reactome
tools.description: Pathway databases for systems biology.

tools.name: Open Targets
tools.description: Systematic identification and prioritisation of targets for drug discovery.

tools.name: ChEMBL
tools.description: Bioactivity data for drug discovery — compounds, targets, activities.

tools.name: HMDB
tools.description: Human metabolome database — 220k+ metabolites.

tools.name: NCBI / Ensembl
tools.description: Genomic reference databases.

tools.name: BioPython
tools.description: Primary Python toolkit for molecular biology — NCBI queries, sequence manipulation, file parsing.

tools.name: Nextflow / Snakemake
tools.description: Reproducible bioinformatics workflow management.

tools.name: Bioconductor
tools.description: R-based genomics and statistics ecosystem.
